## Summary

Describe the BTGS change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- Consensus or chain parameters:
- Wallet, RPC, GUI, or packaging:
- Documentation or metadata:

## Validation

List the commands, builds, node checks, or GitHub Actions runs used to verify this change.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to BTGS and does not reintroduce Bitcoin Core or Bitcoin-Gold runtime paths.
- [ ] Security-sensitive values, chain work, and assume-valid hashes are documented when changed.
- [ ] Release packaging names and config files stay under the BTGS naming scheme.
- [ ] No secrets, local guide files, VPS credentials, or build artifacts are committed.
